news.paragraph: Silver prices saw a slight uptick as market participants assessed the potential impact of the Iran deal on geopolitical stability and inflation expectations. The precious metal's movement reflects broader macroeconomic concerns and investor sentiment towards safe-haven assets. Traders will be watching upcoming inflation data and any further developments regarding the Iran deal for directional cues.

headlines.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation

examples.body: $SLV going green and the lows are gone!
$SLV spacex should lift the tide for all silver. Demand ramping up
